functions.name: SQL
functions.description: Run a PostgreSQL query and return results as a spilled array. Pass a cell range as the second argument — it becomes the 'input' table (first row = headers).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: SQL query string. Use 'input' as the table name for the data range.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Cell range to query (first row = column headers). Available as the 'input' table in SQL.
